chosen_action.title: Deliver live-ready primary-repo-flat publisher contact packet for immediate manual execution

why_this_action.summary: Fresh external lanes are already inside measurement windows, StackOverflow is in cooldown, and the prepared publisher-contact packet is the strongest remaining Codeberg-first lane that can still move forward through immediate manual execution.

expected_outcome: Immediate manual execution of at least one prepared publisher-contact request that can create a Codeberg-first citation path without waiting for another automated lane.

measurement_window.success_metric: At least one publisher contact attempt is sent, followed by any attributable qualified repo inspection or Codeberg adoption movement.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If still unsent by the review checkpoint, replace this lane instead of refreshing the same packet again.
